title: Illegal Recruitment Liability of Licensees and Authorized Persons
content: Is illegal recruitment committed only by those without license or authority from the POEA? No. A licensee or a holder of authority, when it conducts any of the prohibited acts enumerated in Section 6 of RA 8042 may be charged with illegal recruitment.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
